description: Multiple SQL injection vulnerabilities in Mic_Blog 0.0.3, when magic_quotes_gpc is disabled, allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands via the (1) cat parameter to category.php, the (2) user parameter to login.php, and the (3) site parameter to register.php.
